title: K Raheja Corp is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: K Raheja Corp is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
K Raheja Corp has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Allahabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About K Raheja Corp:
K Raheja Corp is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with K Raheja Corp!
